exercises.title: Steane to Reed-Muller Encoder
exercises.description: Implement the encoding circuit for Steane to Reed-Muller switching.
tasks: Verify resulting state is valid Reed-Muller codeword
Check that logical qubit is preserved
hints: Steane is subcode of RM - use inclusion structure

exercises.title: Transversal T via Switching
exercises.description: Implement T gate using code switching protocol.
tasks: Start with state in Steane code
exercises.expectedOutput: Full T gate via code switching
hints: Error correct before and after switching
T^⊗15 is logical T for RM code
Verify by comparing to direct T simulation
Track logical X and Z through process

exercises.title: Gauge Fixing Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate gauge fixing in a subsystem code.
tasks: Measure gauge operators to fix configuration
Show how different gauge configs give different transversal gates
hints: Fixing gauges reduces to standard code

exercises.title: Code Deformation Visualizer
exercises.description: Visualize code deformation on surface code patches.
tasks: Create surface code patch with defects
hints: Moving defect = sequence of stabilizer changes
